name: Smallmouth a La Spednik Sauteed Bass Meunier
recipeInstructions:
1. Dredge the whole bass or fillets in a mix of cornmeal, flour, salt, and pepper.
2. Saute slowly in the melted butter over medium heat until well browned on one side.
3. Carefully turn the fish with a spatula and brown the other side.
4. Remove the fish to a warm platter when it has turned opaque.
5. Garnish with parsley.
6. Stir vinegar into the fat and pour over the fish.
